subject: Correction
body:
Dear Lesley
Correction joi Itoh cannot do Saturday 3 rd so
Can you check with Jeffry if I can visit him at island on December 2 Nd evening I can stay the weekend
I have a tight schedule :
Boston November 30 / December 1 joi Itoh
Montreal on 2 nd meeting the Primeminister
St Thomas 2 nd evening
Lima 4/5 th meeting Primeminister on 4 th and president on 5 th
Dubai 8 th Dpworld board meeting
Sultan
Sent from my iPhone

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: <Sultan.BinSulayem@dubaiworld.ae<mailto:Sultan.BinSulayem@dubaiworld.ae>>
Date: November 25, 2016 at 11:40:23 AM GMT+4
To: <lesley.jee@gmail.com<mailto:lesley.jee@gmail.com>>
Cc: Jeffrey <jeevacation@gmail.com<mailto:jeevacation@gmail.com>>, Jeffrey <jeeproject@yahoo.com<mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com>>
Subject: My visit

Dear Lesley
Can you check with Jeffry if I can visit him at island on No 30 th afternoon I will leave to Montreal 1 st at 4 pm
I have a tight schedule :
Montreal on 2 nd meeting the Primeminister
Boston 3 rd meeting joi Itoh
Lima 4/5 th meeting Primeminister on 4 th and president on 5 th
Dubai 8 th Dpworld board meeting
Sultan
Sent from my iPhone
NOTE: This e-mail message is subject to the Dubai World Group disclaimer see http://www.dubaiworld.ae/email_disclaimer
